name: Lucid Diagnostics Inc.
summary: Lucid Diagnostics Inc. is a commercial-stage cancer prevention medical diagnostics company focused on detecting esophageal precancer and cancer in patients with gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD). Its flagship product, the EsoGuard Esophageal DNA Test, is performed on samples collected with the EsoCheck Esophageal Cell Collection Device. EsoGuard is a bisulfite-converted targeted next-generation sequencing DNA assay quantifying methylation at 31 sites on VIM and CCNA1 genes. The company operates Lucid Test Centers, satellite test center programs, and mobile testing units across the U.S.

products.name: EsoGuard Esophageal DNA Test
products.description: Bisulfite-converted targeted NGS DNA assay detecting methylation on VIM and CCNA1 genes to identify esophageal precancer and cancer in at-risk GERD patients.

products.name: EsoCheck Esophageal Cell Collection Device
products.description: FDA 510(k)-cleared and CE Mark-certified swallowable balloon capsule catheter device for noninvasive, targeted collection of surface esophageal cells in-office.

partnerships.description: Lucid licenses patented technology underlying EsoGuard and EsoCheck from CWRU.
Lucid has a relationship with PAVmed, identified as a related-party risk factor in the filing.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
